title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a comprehensive news roundup covering 20+ recent AI developments and announcements. Featured items include new models like Grok 4.3, Mistral 3.5, and SenseNova U1, alongside emerging applications in robotics, video generation, 3D reconstruction, and agentic AI systems. The coverage reflects the rapid pace of AI tool releases and research breakthroughs across multiple domains.
